DP.520.0000:
What would bring you to a place
so far off the beaten path?\f
There is nothing to see but some
ancient Pokémon etchings...
DP.520.0001:
They say this town has been here
since Sinnoh was made.
DP.520.0002:
Oh, now, this is interesting.
Let’s see your Pokémon.\f
DP.520.0003:
It clearly likes you very much.
You can have this!\f
DP.520.0004:
It’s about trust between the Trainer
and the Pokémon.\f
Developing trust in each other is
the key to victory.
DP.520.0005:
It’s warming up to you in 
a very nice way.\f
It will grow even more friendly if
you travel with it some more.
DP.520.0006:
It’s not very used to you yet.\f
You both need to develop trust for
one another as Trainer and Pokémon.
